text.message: Can you help me take wood metro?
He can take this turn and win otherwise
I’m not native and I don’t understand why I can’t say that some player is “he”
We’re in the game with icons, not that genders are mattering here
It’s just a matter of respect for your opponents
I do respect opponents, but I don’t care about their genders in that game
And I don’t mean that she is a man by saying “he”
ok well i was just telling you
So it is still a mistake?
Correct way to say would be “they”?
Ok, it’s just confusing a lil bit
5ey is. It’s si gulag and plural
They is both singular and plural
Ok, will use they then to not offend anybody
